cap.name: Captain America
cap.bio: Meant to be a human weapon in World War II, Steve Rogers was enhanced by the Super-Soldier Serum, giving him the strength to lead any army into battle!

comics.title: Captain America: Man Out of Time
comics.description: Essentially the "Year One" comic series for Captain America, as Steve Rogers awakens in the modern day after being frozen since 1945.

comics.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
comics.description: Believing that his best friend died after falling out of a plane, Steve Rogers soon discovers Bucky Barnes is alive and has been brainwashed into an assassin and spy for HYDRA.

entertainment.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
entertainment.description: The origins of Steve Rogers becoming Captain America in the MCU! After being unfit for the Allied Troops in World War II, Steve Rogers took a dose of the Super-Soldier Serum to give them a fighting chance against Red Skull and HYDRA.

entertainment.title: The Avengers
entertainment.description: The first Avengers movie, where some of Marvel's most iconic heroes have to learn how to work as a team in order to prevent Loki and his army of aliens from taking over the Earth!

entertainment.title: Captain America: Civil War
entertainment.description: After politics are involved with superhero affairs, Captain America and Iron Man take opposing sides in beliefs about government interference.

daredevil.name: Daredevil
daredevil.bio: Lawyer by day and crime-fighting vigiliante by night, Matt Murdock was blinded by a radioactive substance, granting him insanely heightened senses and allowing him to "see" better than anyone.

comics.title: Daredevil: The Man Without Fear
comics.description: The quintessential origin story of Daredevil! Written by Frank Miller, this comic series retells Matt Murdock's early days becoming a vigilante!

comics.title: Daredevil: Born Again
comics.description: Possibly the most iconic Daredevil comic run of all time, Born Again details Matt Murdock's struggle to live, as the Kingpin (Wilson Fisk) aims to destroy every part of his life after learning his secret identity.

entertainment.title: Daredevil
entertainment.description: One of the earliest live action adaptations of Daredevil, Ben Affleck as Matt Murdock fights against injustice after he is blinded by radioactive chemicals in an accident.

entertainment.title: Daredevil
entertainment.description: The pinnacle of Marvel television, the Daredevil TV series is the definitive live action adaptation of Matt Murdock!

entertainment.title: Daredevil: Born Again
entertainment.description: Although it has almost nothing to do with the comic run of the same name, Daredevil: Born Again is a great continuation of the original 2015 TV series.

punisher.name: The Punisher
punisher.bio: After his family was killed in a mob hit, Frank Castle dedicated his life's work to fighting crime in his own way: by becoming judge, jury, and executioner.

comics.title: The Punisher: Year One
comics.description: A vividly detailed comic series that depicts Frank Castle's origin story and how he became the Punisher!

comics.title: Punisher MAX
comics.description: A gritty and ruthless comic run set in an alternate universe where the Punisher is even more brutal as he faces a world without superhumans.

entertainment.title: Punisher: War Zone
entertainment.description: Often said to be the most comic accurate live action Punisher, the late Ray Stevenson's Frank Castle wages a war against the mafia.

entertainment.title: Daredevil (Season 2)
entertainment.description: Frank Castle's violent first appearance in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU).

entertainment.title: The Punisher
entertainment.description: Set after the events of Daredevil Season 2, Frank Castle seeks revenge on the people behind his family's murder.

entertainment.title: Daredevil: Born Again (Season 1)
entertainment.description: After crimelord Wilson Fisk (a.k.a. the Kingpin) became Mayor of New York City, the creation of his Anti-Vigilante Task Force forces Daredevil and the Punisher to team up against Fisk's reign of terror.

entertainment.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
entertainment.description: An hour-long TV special detailing Frank Castle's struggle with PTSD, when suddenly crime boss Ma Gnucci puts a bounty on his head, forcing the Punisher to spring back into action.

spiderman.name: Spider-Man
spiderman.bio: Bitten by a radioactive spider as a teenager, Peter Parker sees it as his responsibility to use his great powers to protect and help out every person he can.

comics.title: Amazing Fantasy #15
comics.description: The first ever appearance of the wallcrawler!

comics.title: Ultimate Spider-Man #1
comics.description: A reinterpretation of Spider-Man from the early 2000s. This comic run was used as inspiration for multiple live action movies!

entertainment.title: Spider-Man: The Animated Series
entertainment.description: A classic TV series beloved by fans of all ages. This show inspired many storylines in movies and video games, even today!

entertainment.title: The Spectacular Spider-Man
entertainment.description: Often said to be the best animated Spider-Man show, The Spectacular Spider-Man is a timeless classic with an iconic artstyle.

entertainment.title: Spider-Man
entertainment.description: The iconic and campy live action classic starring Tobey Maguire's Spider-Man versus Willem Dafoe's Green Goblin!

entertainment.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
entertainment.description: The origin of Andrew Garfield's Spider-Man. After losing his parents and Uncle Ben, Peter Parker seeks to solve the mystery behind his parents' disappearance when he meets Dr. Curt Connors, who turns into The Lizard!

entertainment.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
entertainment.description: The first solo movie of Tom Holland's Spider-Man. Peter Parker, desperate to prove himself to his mentor Tony Stark, is put to the ultimate test when The Vulture threatens him and his loved ones.

entertainment.title: Marvel's Spider-Man
entertainment.description: Nominated for Game of the Year in 2018, the first game in Insomniac Games's Spider-Man series is known as the definitive Spider-Man video game experience.

entertainment.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
entertainment.description: One of, if not, the best Spider-Man movies out there, the first movie in the Spider-Verse series depicts Miles Morales's struggle with becoming Spider-Man, as other Spider-Variants try to mentor him.
